SEARCH
Package app.service.impl.indicators

Class IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator

java.lang.Object
app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Enclosing class:
IndicatorsServiceImpl
static class IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator extends Object
Internal mathematical engine implementing Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) metrics.

Integrates volume weighting with underlying structural location indicators to map accumulation and distribution flow weights via a sliding buffer architecture.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CmfCalculator(int period)
    Prepares structural buffer memory rings sized precisely to periodic requirements.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) double
    getValue()
    Divides cached money flow values against the cumulative aggregate volume pool.
    (package private) boolean
    isReady()
    Verifies if the sliding buffer architecture is completely filled.
    (package private) void
    update(DataRecord current)
    Computes active Money Flow Multiplier metrics, scaling values against structural volume sizes, and rolls buffer ring configurations forward.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • CmfCalculator

      CmfCalculator(int period)
      Prepares structural buffer memory rings sized precisely to periodic requirements.
      Parameters:
      period - The timeframe window context required for money flow summation.

  • Method Details

    • update

      void update(DataRecord current)
      Computes active Money Flow Multiplier metrics, scaling values against structural volume sizes, and rolls buffer ring configurations forward.
      Parameters:
      current - The active transactional data model snapshot containing price and volume attributes.

    • isReady

      boolean isReady()
      Verifies if the sliding buffer architecture is completely filled.
      Returns:
      true if data ticks matching the period length have been cached; false otherwise.

    • getValue

      double getValue()
      Divides cached money flow values against the cumulative aggregate volume pool.
      Returns:
      The final parsed Chaikin Money Flow indicator valuation.
